summary: client: We want to expand our truck fleet this quarter and support more export routes to Europe. client: Our turnover is $8M, we have operated for 5 years, and the vehicles can be used as collateral.

notes: Client mentioned export or import activity

recommendations.rationale: conversation signals: expand our fleet, export, fleet; business operating for 5 years; turnover captured at 8,000,000
recommendations.policy_excerpt: Commercial vehicle finance is available to established businesses expanding or replacing fleet capacity. The business should have operated for more than 2 years and show annual turnover above 2,000,000.

recommendations.rationale: conversation signals: export, europe; business operating for 5 years; turnover captured at 8,000,000; policy expects import or export activity
recommendations.next_action: Review trade flows and propose facilities
recommendations.policy_excerpt: Trade finance is intended for businesses with import or export activity, supplier settlements, or cross-border working capital needs. The business should have operated for more than 2 years and maintain annual turnover above 1,000,000.

tasks.action: Review trade flows and propose facilities
